ogTitle: Minnie Downs vs Minyama: Climate Safety

heading: Minnie Downs vs Minyama — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Minnie Downs, Queensland and Minyama, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Minnie Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Minyama (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Minnie Downs or Minyama safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Minnie Downs has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Minyama scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Minnie Downs scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Minyama scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Minnie Downs or Minyama?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Minnie Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
